subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1913-05-06
subcodes.first_line: Last night I had a dream. In this dream I saw the Blessed Perfection standing before a large gathering. I was also amongst these people.
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیشب جمال مبارک را در خواب دیدم که بلسانی غیر از السن موجوده تکلم میفرمایند
subcodes.subjects: @Jabulqa and Jabarsa, @universal language, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @accounts of dreams and visions, @the concourse on high
